name: opencode-manager
desc: Mobile-first web interface for OpenCode AI agents. Manage, control, and code with multiple OpenCode agents from any device - your phone, tablet, or desktop. Fe…
descFull: Mobile-first web interface for OpenCode AI agents. Manage, control, and code with multiple OpenCode agents from any device - your phone, tablet, or desktop. Features Git integration, file management, and real-time chat in a responsive PWA. Deploy with Docker for instant setup.
